summary: Round-1 fixes (warning path and env projection) look resolved, but the `mcp-gateway` library registration in `c3a9085` introduces a blocking schema-validation regression.

findings.title: Registering `mcp-gateway` in `data/library.json` makes `readLibrary()` fail on every load
findings.recommendation: Do not add `mcp-gateway` to the curated library until its manifest is schema-conformant, or first extend the metadata schema/capability enum to accept its `mcp-gateway` and `agent-skill` kinds. As written, `readLibrary()` resolves each entry's `apm.yml`, and `parseGarrisonMetadata()` rejects those kinds, so library-backed flows will throw before composition selection can even use the new entry.
